---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Bankrize Everything
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
A clear description of what you'd like added or changed.

**Why it helps**
What problem it solves or what it improves.

**Scope check**
- [ ] Stays read-only (no trading actions)
- [ ] Stays Base-only
- [ ] Uses Bankrize data as the source

**Notes**
Anything else (mockups, examples, links).
